name: /doctor token-cost report writes the snapshot to a structured JSON file for downstream consumption
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --report token-cost --out .claude-tdd-pro/token-cost-snapshot.json 2>err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/token-cost-snapshot.json ] && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-tdd-pro/token-cost-snapshot.json','utf8'))" && echo ok 1>&2
